text_block_list.text:
The days of running through the Twinkle 
Series with your horse girl will soon begin. 
Walking alongside you, her name is——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I'm Stay Gold. Nice to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I'm planning go more wild than last 
time, but are you ready for this?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
If it's with you, I feel like this'll be a good 
journey. To find an undiscovered golden 
route, let's go have some fun!

Just like this, with <chrname>, the battle 
against the Twinkle Series has begun!
